title: People
description: The engineers, architects, and specialists who make ChipVerge's silicon-grade outcomes possible.

profiles.title: Samia Alam
profiles.summary: Senior RTL and verification engineer focused on ASIC design, SoC integration, and synthesis-ready delivery.
profiles.pageIntro: Senior RTL and verification engineer with 4+ years of hands-on experience across high-speed ASIC design, cache controllers, complex bus fabric, and SoC integration.
pageDetails: Samia works end-to-end, from initial microarchitecture definition through lint-clean, CDC-safe synthesis handoff, embedding directly into client teams with zero ramp-up overhead.
Her work spans the complete ASIC and FPGA front-end flow, with deep specialization in UVM-based functional verification, protocol design, and CDC/RDC-safe signoff.

quickFacts.label: Experience
quickFacts.value: 4+ years across ASIC RTL, verification, and SoC integration

quickFacts.label: Delivery style
quickFacts.value: Lint-clean, CDC-safe handoff with direct client-team integration

quickFacts.label: Core stack
quickFacts.value: SystemVerilog, UVM, SVA, RISC-V, STA, Python automation

profiles.expertiseIntro: Spanning the complete ASIC and FPGA front-end flow, from computer architecture and SoC integration through synthesis handoff, with deep specialization in UVM-based functional verification, protocol design, and CDC/RDC-safe signoff.

expertiseSections.title: RTL Design
items: FSM, datapath, and control logic design
ASIC and FPGA implementation with Xilinx Vivado

expertiseSections.title: Computer Architecture & SoC
items: Cache subsystem design and coherence protocols

expertiseSections.title: Functional Verification
items: 95%+ functional coverage as a standard target

expertiseSections.title: Protocols & Interfaces
items: AMBA AXI, AHB, and APB compliance and VIP development
UART, I2C, and SPI peripheral design and verification
Bus fabric, crossbar, and NoC integration

expertiseSections.title: Automation & Tooling
items: Synopsys VCS simulation and regression flows
Xilinx Vivado synthesis and implementation scripting
Automated coverage merging and KPI dashboards

profiles.workingStyleIntro: Every engagement is built on directness, transparency, and a relentless focus on first-time-right quality.

workingStyleSections.title: Embedded in Your Flow
items: Works within your EDA toolchain and licensing
Uses your SCM, review, and communication tools
Productive from day one with no ramp-up lag

workingStyleSections.title: Zero-Defect RTL Philosophy
items: Lint-clean deliverables as a non-negotiable baseline
CDC and RDC analysis on every design

workingStyleSections.title: Transparent Communication
items: Daily status updates on active engagements
Full NDA coverage on all project communications

profiles.footerCtaDescription: Currently accepting new engagements. Describe your silicon challenge and expect a concrete response within 24 hours.
